title: Claude Video Editing Just Became Unrecognizable

extracted.hook: Claude is now editing my videos end to end. All I have to do is drop in a raw file and it is trimming out the mistakes and the dead space.
extracted.vulnerability: "I always tell people to think about it like you're teaching a kid to ride a bike"
extracted.cta: "if you enjoyed the video, please give it a like. It helps me out a ton."
transitions: So yeah, I was able to take this, you know, 50-second clip, drop it into Claude, and then it basically cut out all of the mistakes, all of the filler words, and now we have a 27 second clip with all of the motion graphics that you guys just saw.
But not only that, you can see we also have this timeline editor, which has all of the actual elements down here, all of the different motion graphics.
So if I wanted to, I could delete these, I could move them around, and I could change the timing because obviously what's super important about motion graphics is the timing.
So now we have this actual interface within our Hyperframes dashboard to make some really quick iterations.
All right, so before we get into it, let's talk about the way that this actually works and sort of the tech stack that we're using.
And then if I wanted to add any animations, I would be doing that manually.
So today I'm going to show you guys step by step setting up a fresh Cloud project.
We're going to get everything we need to get installed installed and by the end you're going to know exactly how to edit videos just like you saw in the intro.
So, this planning stage is very important.
Okay, so we got a plan back,
So, let's go to the actual timeline.
Now, if you come into the top right of the desktop app and you click on preview,
Okay, so it looks like we're at a spot where this has come back with a version for us to look at.
vocabulary: vertical crop with rounded edges and a drop shadow
analogies: "So, I was doing this manually and I was doing this manually. And then if I wanted to add any animations, I would be doing that manually."
"it's basically showing us what word is the anchor. So, what word is going to trigger the scene to basically start"
"In my real project, I have video projects, right? So, if I open this up, you can see how many different videos I've made"
"So, let's say I make five different lessons. Now, I can basically say, 'Okay, cool. build a lesson design markdown philosophy file, which means every time I build a lesson, just use that.'"
"And that's where you truly get to the point of dropping in a raw file and having it edited end to end once you've kind of established a style for that type of video."
curiosity_gaps: "I'll show you guys a few other examples of what's possible"
"So it has a nice little background"
"It's got my face in the lower right corner"
"It has these motion graphics coming in"
"But I just like the hyperframes animations a little bit more"
"Real quick, I'll just show you guys a few other examples of what's possible"
"So it has a nice little background"
"It's got my face in the lower right corner"
"It has these motion graphics coming in"
"But I just like the hyperframes animations a little bit more"
"And all of that is obviously baked into our pipeline right here"

"We're going to get everything we need to get installed installed and by the end you're going to know exactly how to edit videos just like you saw in the intro."
